name: T-Rex Golf
address: 1115 Central Ave, Hot Springs National Park, AR 71901
about: T-Rex Fun Spot is a family-oriented entertainment venue in Hot Springs, Arkansas, offering a variety of attractions beyond golf simulation. The facility includes laser tag, go-karts, a 4-seat gyroscope, a climbing wall, and a 5D virtual reality ride, with black light miniature golf and the largest rope/zip line course in Hot Springs. Patrons can choose individual attraction pricing at $8 per activity plus tax, with the exception of the rope/zip course at $16, or opt for a 2-hour unlimited wristband for $40 tax included. The venue operates with a focus on group and party bookings, offering two distinct birthday party packages that include a private party room and access to selected attractions.
why_golfers_like_it: Variety of non-golf attractions for mixed group entertainment
Affordable, all-inclusive wristband option for 2 hours of fun
Party packages available for private group events with dedicated space

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service on site. Likely allows outside food or caters for parties.
No mention of alcohol service on premises.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, clubs are not required as the venue offers a variety of non-golf activities like laser tag, go-karts, and a rope/zip course.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a food or drink policy. It is recommended to contact the venue directly for details on outside food and beverages.

faq.question: How long does it take to complete 18 holes?
faq.answer: This venue does not offer traditional golf simulation; its main attractions like laser tag, go-karts, and mini golf are time-based activities, not 18-hole golf experiences.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, T-Rex Fun Spot is highly kid-friendly, featuring attractions like black light miniature golf, a climbing wall, and dedicated birthday party packages specifically designed for children.
